Frequently asked questions

Future is a dating app where an AI matchmaker actually gets to know you before introducing you to anyone. Instead of handing you an endless feed of profiles to swipe through, you have a real conversation with the matchmaker about who you are and what you're looking for — and it uses that to find people worth meeting, not just people worth swiping on.

Most dating apps make money by keeping you in the app — more swiping, more matches, more time spent. That design quietly rewards the app for you never actually meeting anyone. Future is built around the opposite incentive: fewer, more considered matches, and a nudge toward an actual first date instead of an endless chat that goes nowhere.

Honestly — we got tired of swiping being the whole experience instead of a small step before the real thing. We're building Future because we think matchmaking should feel like it's done by someone who knows you, not a slot machine you pull until something looks good. That's the whole bet.

That's the hope, but we're not going to oversell it this early — what you'll see at launch is intentionally simple: the AI conversation and matching, nothing more. We have a lot more in mind, but we'd rather learn from how real early members actually use Future first, and build on top of what we learn instead of guessing. If launch feels a little skeletal, that's on purpose.

Future is rolling out city by city so every new member gets a matchmaker who actually knows their city and can find good matches nearby. The waitlist lets us bring people in gradually as we open up each city, instead of launching everywhere at once and stretching the experience thin.

It depends on your position and how fast your city fills up. Signing up early helps, and sharing your invite link moves you up the list faster since referred friends jump you ahead. We'll email you the moment your spot opens up.

Once you're off the waitlist, your first conversation with the matchmaker usually takes about 10-15 minutes. It asks about who you are, what you're looking for, and your dating preferences so it can start finding better matches for you right away.

Future Dates is our done-for-you date planning feature. Once two people match and both opt in, each side puts in a small amount toward the date, and Future takes care of picking and booking a nearby cafe or activity that suits you both — so instead of endless back-and-forth over "where should we go," you just show up.

About Us

We're a small team of engineers trying to shape the Future.

Created by Aman Singh and Siddharth Nishad.

Legal

TL;DR — we only collect what we need to match you well, we don't sell your info, and you can cancel or delete your account anytime. Be kind, be safe, and we'll handle the rest.

Privacy Policy

We collect the information you give us when you join the waitlist and use Future — things like your basic details, preferences, and conversations with the matchmaker — solely to find you better matches and improve the experience. Your interview responses and profile information are processed using Google's Gemini API to generate your compatibility profile and identify potential matches; we use Google's paid API tier for this, so your data is not used to train Google's AI models. We do not sell your personal data to third parties, and we only share it with the people and services needed to run the app (like our AI matching provider, secure database hosting, or payment processing for Future Dates), under confidentiality obligations. You can request a copy of your data, ask us to correct it, or delete your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at support@heyfuture.site — we'll delete your account and associated data within 30 days of your request, except where we need to retain certain information for security, fraud prevention, or legal compliance.

Terms of Service

Eligibility. Future is intended solely for individuals 18 years of age or older. By joining the waitlist or using Future, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years old. We reserve the right to terminate any account found to belong to someone under 18.

By joining the waitlist or using Future, you agree to use the app respectfully and honestly — accurate profile information, no harassment, no impersonation, and no using the platform to harm or deceive other members. Future Dates bookings are subject to availability and the policies of the venues involved. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms. We may update these terms as the product evolves, and we'll let you know when we do.

Reporting & Safety

If another member violates these terms — including harassment, impersonation, or dishonest profile information — please report them in the app or by emailing support@heyfuture.site. We review every report and may warn, suspend, or permanently remove accounts that break these rules. We aim to review reports within 48 hours.

Meeting Safely

Getting matched is just the start — a few habits go a long way toward a safe first date. Video call before you meet in person, so you know who you're actually meeting. Meet in a public place for your first date, and let a friend know where you'll be. Never send money, gift cards, or financial information to someone you've matched with, no matter what story they give you — this is one of the most common online dating scams. If anything feels off, trust that instinct and report it to us.

SMS Terms

If you provide a phone number, you agree to receive SMS messages from Future related to your waitlist status, account, and matches. Message and data rates may apply. You can opt out at any time by replying STOP, or by emailing support@heyfuture.site.
